privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic electrical engineering task where all data is created fresh by setup_task.sh. The task operates on a fictional Building 4 Single Line Diagram (SLD) at /home/ga/Diagrams/building_4_sld.drawio, with an engineering memo at /home/ga/Desktop/project_memo_ev_expansion.txt specifying real electrical standards: 225A MLO panel rated at 480/277V 3-phase 4-wire (standard US industrial voltage system per ANSI/IEEE), 200A 3-pole breaker, and 3#3/0 AWG copper wire (verified as appropriate for 200A service per NEC ampacity tables). The memo, diagram, and directory structure are all created by the task setup script. The draw.io desktop application version 26.0.9 is a real, documented release (GitHub jgraph/drawio-desktop). All electrical specifications reference real engineering standards used in actual industrial facilities.
